title: Marketplace Manager - Juicy Chemistry - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Juicy Chemistry - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!
